# PERF-92 positive: Fiber c captured inside a goroutine
lang: go
file: PERF-092-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gofiber/fiber/v2"
)

func FireAndForget(c *fiber.Ctx) error {
	go func() {
		process(c)
	}()
	return c.SendString("queued")
}

func process(c *fiber.Ctx) {
	_ = c.Path()
}
